idea-plugin.name: Smart Hex Preview
idea-plugin.description:
Smart Hex Preview

Automatically recognizes 6-digit hex color codes (#XXXXXX) wrapped in [], (), single quotes or double quotes, and renders them inline as colored blocks with a clickable gutter indicator. Click a gutter block to open a color picker and replace the hex value in place (wrappers are preserved).

Custom regex patterns can be added in Settings | Tools | Smart Hex Preview.
